ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 选择文件夹...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Choose between the classic package folder export and a single self-contained HTML file.
Single HTML keeps everything in one file, but large canvases can quickly grow to several megabytes and browser-dependent limits may matter more.
ast.target: 在经典包文件夹导出和单个自包含 HTML 文件之间进行选择。\n单个 HTML 文件将所有内容保存在一个文件中，但大型画布可能迅速增长到几兆字节，浏览器相关的限制可能更为重要。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a dark HTML layout by default for exported pages.
ast.target: 默认为导出的页面使用深色 HTML 布局。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include a minimap with the current viewport on the exported canvas page.
ast.target: 在导出的画布页面上包含一个带有当前视口的小地图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include a search overlay with result list and node navigation on the exported canvas page.
ast.target: 在导出的画布页面上包含一个带有结果列表和节点导航的搜索覆盖层。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 导出

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 导出格式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示小地图

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示搜索

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 语法高亮

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 输出文件夹

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Type to search folders in the vault...
ast.target: 输入以搜索库中的文件夹...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: KaTeX doesn't work in quirks mode. Make sure your website has a suitable doctype.
ast.target: 警告：KaTeX 在怪异模式下不起作用。请确保您的网站具有合适的文档类型声明。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `engine` option is required. Use `createOnigurumaEngine` or `createJavaScriptRegexEngine` to create an engine.
ast.target: `engine` 选项是必需的。使用 `createOnigurumaEngine` 或 `createJavaScriptRegexEngine` 来创建引擎。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到活动的画布文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这会将数学公式设置为显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面上，独占一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.
ast.target: 确定输出的标记语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的双参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，则会抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定的数字，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将活动画布导出为 HTML

ast.name: text
ast.source: Exports the active canvas either as a portable package folder or as a single self-contained HTML file.
ast.target: 将活动画布导出为可移植的包文件夹或单个自包含的 HTML 文件。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 选择输出文件夹
